settings.eyebrow: PARTNER PROGRAM · FOR INDEPENDENT BIKE SHOPS
settings.heading:
TURN OLD BIKES
INTO NEW SALES.
settings.subtitle:
A trade-in program that closes the sale you were about to lose.
No appraisals, no listings, no shipping fees, no risk.

settings.title:
THEY WON'T BUY NEW UNTIL
THE OLD BIKE IS GONE
settings.body: The trade-in conversation is the sale. Without it, they leave to figure it out on their own — and they don't come back.

settings.title:
FACEBOOK MARKETPLACE
TAKES 3–8 WEEKS
settings.body: Meet strangers, haggle, no-shows. By the time they sell it, they've forgotten why they walked into your shop.

settings.title:
YOU LOSE THE UPSELL
EVERY TIME
settings.body: No trade-in value to apply, no reason to buy today. The accessories, the fit, the service relationship — all walk out the door with them.

settings.heading: THE PROBLEM
settings.description:
Your customer walks in with an old bike in their head.
And walks out without a new one.

settings.title: QUOTE IN STORE
settings.body: The customer brings their bike to your counter. You submit the make, model, and condition. Written offer within 24 hours from the same engine that has priced 3,500 bikes.

settings.title: ISSUE STORE CREDIT
settings.body: Customer accepts. You issue store credit at 1.25× our cash offer — applied immediately toward a new bike, parts, or service. Runs through your existing POS: Lightspeed, Ascend, Square, or a paper gift card.

settings.title: YOU SHIP
settings.body: We email a prepaid FedEx label the moment the customer accepts. Box the bike, hand it to FedEx. That's it. You don't manage shipping, returns, or anything after this.

settings.title: WE PAY, INSTANTLY
settings.body: ACH hits your account the moment FedEx scans the label — not on delivery, not on inspection. Same-day direct deposit. You've already been reimbursed before we even open the box.

settings.heading:
FOUR STEPS.
NO INVENTORY.
NO RISK.
settings.description:
Submit in 2 minutes. Offer in 24 hours.
Credit, same day.

settings.title: RETURN WITHIN 30 DAYS
settings.description: Customers who accept store credit come back to your shop within a month. Usually for a bike. Often for a bigger one than they came in considering.

settings.title: AVERAGE BASKET AT REDEMPTION
settings.description: They spend 40% more than the credit value. The credit is the down payment that gets them off the fence and into a new bike.

settings.heading:
YOU EARN ON THE CREDIT.
AND ON THE UPSELL.
settings.description: Here's how it works: when a customer's bike is accepted, you issue store credit at 1.25× our cash offer — applied to their next purchase at your shop. We reimburse the full credit amount plus a 12% partner margin on top. Instant ACH, paid the moment FedEx scans the label.
settings.tagline: Cash buys a coffee. Credit buys their next bike — from you.

settings.title: 01 · QUOTE THE BIKE
settings.body: Customer brings their bike in. Submit make, model, condition. We come back within 24 hours with a written offer you can present with confidence.

settings.title: 02 · ISSUE STORE CREDIT
settings.body: Customer accepts. Run the credit through your existing POS — Lightspeed, Ascend, Square, or a paper gift card. Whatever you already use.

settings.title: 03 · BOX AND SHIP
settings.body: We email a prepaid FedEx label the moment the customer accepts. Box the bike, hand it to FedEx. You're done.

settings.title: PRICING
settings.body: Same valuation engine that has priced 3,500 bikes and paid out $5.4M. Updated weekly against live resale data.

settings.title: INSTANT PAYMENT
settings.body: ACH hits your account the moment FedEx scans the label. No Net-15, no monthly statements, no waiting on inspection.

settings.title: PREPAID SHIPPING
settings.body: We send the FedEx label. You box and drop. We cover the freight on every accepted offer.

settings.title: INSPECTION & RESALE
settings.body: Bike arrives at our Santa Ana warehouse. Mechanic-inspected within 24 hours. Resold through our buyer base — 99.8% positive feedback.

settings.title: ALL POST-SHIP SUPPORT
settings.body: Customer service, returns, warranty on every credit issued — all routes to our team, not yours.

settings.strip_items: NO APPRAISALS, NO PHOTOGRAPHY, NO LISTINGS, NO SHIPPING FEES, NO CUSTOMER SERVICE AFTER, NO RETURNS

settings.label: WEEK 0
settings.title: SIGN & GO LIVE
settings.body: Labels and training pack sent same day. Your team is ready in 25 minutes. Live within 7 days.

settings.label: WEEKS 1–4
settings.title: FIRST TRADE-INS SHIP
settings.body: Trade-ins start flowing to WH-C. Co-branded launch email to your customer list — you approve the copy before it sends.

settings.label: WEEKS 5–8
settings.title: TUNE PRICING
settings.body: Shared dashboard shows trade-in volume, redemption rate, basket lift. We adjust the uplift together if the numbers say so.

settings.label: WEEKS 9–12
settings.title: JOINT REVIEW
settings.body: Sit-down with Kevin (COO). Walk through the data. Decide together whether to continue, scale, or adjust.

settings.label: DAY 91
settings.title: CONTINUE OR WALK.
settings.body: No termination fee. No equipment to return. Continue, or stop sending bikes. That's the whole agreement.

settings.title: A standard bike box on hand
settings.body: So your team can pack the bike when a customer accepts. We'll ship you flat-packed boxes on request — free.

settings.title: One team training, 25 minutes
settings.body: We come to you, or send video. Every staff member who runs the counter. That's it.

settings.title:
Permission to email your
customer list — once
settings.body: Co-branded launch announcement. You approve the copy before it sends. We never use it again without asking.

settings.title:
A signature on a 1-page
pilot agreement
settings.body: Plain English. No exclusivity, no minimums, no termination fees. One page.
